---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Kainex
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description / 描述

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce / 复现步骤

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior / 期望行为

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior / 实际行为

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment / 环境信息

- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Python version**: [e.g., 3.12.x]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g., 22.x]
- **Browser** (if frontend issue): [e.g., Chrome 130]
- **Kainex version / commit**: [e.g., v0.1.0 or commit hash]

## Affected Component / 影响组件

- [ ] Engine (backtest, strategies, paper trading, risk)
- [ ] Collector (data sources, storage)
- [ ] Frontend (dashboard, charts, UI)
- [ ] API (REST endpoints, WebSocket)
- [ ] Other

## Logs / 日志

<details>
<summary>Relevant log output</summary>

```
Paste logs here
```

</details>

## Additional Context / 补充信息

Any other context about the problem.
